reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Un sandwich de pan lactal con una feta de jamon y una de queso $150, un robo. No hay variedad. No me quisieron recibir los billetes de $5. Los baños feos. Una verguenza que una YPF emblematica como esta tenga estas caracteristicas

(Translated by Google)
A sandwich on white bread with a slice of ham and a slice of cheese costs $150—a rip-off. There's no variety. They wouldn't accept my $5 bills. The bathrooms are awful. It's a disgrace that such an iconic YPF station has these conditions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzd3AtaUx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar (pero el único) para hacer una parada, en camino por la ruta 40 . Tienen kiosko y cafetería con sandwiches y tartas. Precios muy caros. Baños en buenas condiciones.

(Translated by Google)
A good place (but the only one) to stop off on Route 40. They have a kiosk and cafe with sandwiches and cakes. The prices are very high. The bathrooms are in good condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzb0xIRFpREAE

reviews.comment:
Hay un solo bajo para mujeres, es insuficiente por la cantidad de gente que pasa. Los precios carisimos. Y la atención regular/mala.

(Translated by Google)
There's only one floor for women, which isn't enough for the amount of people passing through. The prices are very expensive, and the service is average/poor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzODkzalJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene entrada por los dos lados de la ruta...pero los cráneos que trabajan ahí hacen que los autos entren por un solo lado a los surtidores....por lo tanto se arma un quilombo enorme.....usen la cabeza muchachos que no solo es para usar la gorra

(Translated by Google)
It has entrances on both sides of the road...but the idiots who work there make sure the cars only enter the pumps from one side...so it creates a huge mess...use your heads, guys, it's not just for wearing a hat
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbzhuUnJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Disfruta de la visita y olvídate de todo lo demás, especialmente de que te atiendan bien.

(Translated by Google)
Enjoy your visit and forget about everything else, especially the quality of service.
